title: Billing usage — by customer (§13, §19)
description: ClickHouse-backed, not Prometheus: per-customer breakdown is high-cardinality by nature (crates/usage's usage_rollup_daily table), so this reads the same ClickHouse rollup the usage service writes rather than a Prometheus series. Query verified against a live ClickHouse (grafana-clickhouse-datasource v4.19.0, format 0/1 both tested).

panels.title: Metered quantity / day, by event type

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, event_type, sum(total_quantity) AS quantity FROM usage_rollup_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day) GROUP BY day, event_type ORDER BY day

panels.title: Top 20 customers by metered quantity (window)
panels.description: SummingMergeTree — this aggregates on read (GROUP BY) rather than trusting a bare SELECT, per the table's own doc comment (unmerged parts).

targets.rawSql: SELECT customer_id, event_type, sum(total_quantity) AS quantity, sum(events) AS events FROM usage_rollup_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day) GROUP BY customer_id, event_type ORDER BY quantity DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT day AS time, sum(events) AS events FROM usage_rollup_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
